Package org.aavso.tools.vstar.util.date

Class AbstractDateUtil

java.lang.Object
org.aavso.tools.vstar.util.date.AbstractDateUtil
Direct Known Subclasses:
MeeusDateUtil
public abstract class AbstractDateUtil extends Object
This abstract class is the base for classes that need to convert between Julian Day and Calendar Date.

  • Method Details

    • getInstance

      public static AbstractDateUtil getInstance()
      Getter for date AbstractDateUtil Singleton.
      Returns:
      The concrete AbstractDateUtil Singleton instance.

    • jdToCalendar

      public abstract String jdToCalendar(double jd) throws IllegalArgumentException
      Method to convert the integer part of a JD into a calendar date.
      Parameters:
      jd - Julian Day (double)
      Returns:
      calendar date string of the form "YEAR MON DAY"
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException

    • jdToYMD

      public abstract YMD jdToYMD(double jd) throws IllegalArgumentException
      Method to convert the integer part of a JD into a calendar date.
      Parameters:
      jd - Julian Day (double)
      Returns:
      structure of the form year, month, day
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException

    • calendarToJD

      public abstract double calendarToJD(int year, int month, double day) throws IllegalArgumentException
      Method to convert the Julian Day corresponding to the specified year, month, and day.
      Parameters:
      year - The year.
      month - The month (1..12).
      day - The day which may contain a fractional component.
      Returns:
      The Julian Day (double)
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException

    • getMonthName

      public String getMonthName(int month) throws IllegalArgumentException
      Returns the name of the month given the month number.
      Parameters:
      month - The month number from 1..12
      Returns:
      The month name
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException
